intro: We work across the full production process, from the first conversation about a song to the final mix. Whether you're starting from a voice memo or you've already been in pre-production for months, we can find the right point to come in.
pre_production: The decisions you make before you step into the studio are often the most important ones you'll make. Getting things like arrangement right ahead of time saves you money, saves you stress, and almost always produces a better record.
recording: Full production from scratch, or tracking support for projects that are already in motion. We record live instruments, vocals, and electronic elements, and we're comfortable working across genres, though we have particular experience in singer-songwriter, indie rock, folk, and electronic music.
mixing: Mix-only projects are welcome. Send us your session files and we'll return a polished stereo mix with revisions. We prefer to work closely with the artist throughout the mix process rather than delivering one pass and waiting for feedback, because the conversation in between is usually where the record actually comes together.
session_musicians: We have a small network of trusted session musicians we work with regularly. They're people who understand how to complement a production rather than overwhelm it. Available on request.
